findings: Alpha stabilization: k_min=1 alpha went from continuous divergence (1.903->1.751->1.645) to flat (1.645->1.657). Structural equilibrium reached.
Dual regime stable: k_min=2 tail remains scale-free (alpha=2.124, within [2.0,3.0]). Bulk orphan mass prevents full scale-free.
Hub mega-concentration: L-601 in-degree 60->121 (+102%). Gap to #2 hub (L-613, 24) is 5.0x. Single hub captures 5.5% of all edges.
Orphan rate improving: 26.0%->23.7% (full graph). Knowledge integration continuing slowly.
Graph equilibrium hypothesis: alpha stabilization + hub concentration = mature preferential attachment where new citations go to existing hubs, not distributed.
verdict: HARDENED — structural equilibrium reached. Alpha stable, hub concentration accelerating. Graph topology settled.
